summary: Ordering flow end-to-end test. Backend (categories, products, POST /api/orders, GET /api/orders/{id}) all working. Homepage regression fine — cart-open-btn added to navbar. Add-to-cart from homepage populates drawer correctly. HOWEVER: cart state is lost on every route change AND localStorage persistence is completely absent, which fully blocks checkout → order confirmation flow.
passed: Homepage renders, cart-open-btn visible in navbar
add-to-cart-hill-filter-coffee adds item, drawer shows 'Hill Filter Coffee SMALL 1 ₹40 Subtotal ₹40'
MenuPage loads with 9 menu-product tiles, variant-masala-chai-Regular click + menu-add-masala-chai click works
Checkout page renders with checkout-name & checkout-phone inputs; Place Order button correctly disabled when cart empty

failed.issue: Cart items are NEVER written to localStorage. After adding Hill Filter Coffee on / , dumping localStorage shows only PostHog keys — no cart key. CartContext localStorage sync is broken or absent.
failed.evidence: page.evaluate over Object.entries(localStorage) after add-to-cart: only 'ph_phc_..._posthog' key present, no cart entry.

failed.issue: Even without page reload, clicking the Menu link (SPA nav) after adding an item causes drawer on /menu to show '0 items — Your basket is empty'. CartProvider is likely being remounted per-route instead of at App root, OR the nav link is an <a href> forcing hard reload.
failed.evidence: Home: added 1 item, drawer shows '1 item'. Click Menu nav link → /menu → open drawer → '0 items'.

failed.issue: Because cart doesn't persist, /checkout always shows 'Your basket is empty' and 'Place Pickup Order' button stays disabled even after filling valid name='Test User' and phone='+919999999999'. Cannot POST /api/orders from UI.
failed.evidence: Screenshot: order summary sidebar shows 'Your basket is empty.'; place-order button remains disabled after fill.

action_items: Verify CartProvider is mounted at the App root (wrapping <BrowserRouter>/<Routes>), not inside a route component that unmounts on navigation.
Verify CartContext reducer has a useEffect(() => localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify(state)), [state]) AND that the initial state reads from localStorage.getItem('cart').
Ensure Navbar links use react-router <Link> not raw <a href> (a raw <a> would hard-reload and, combined with missing localStorage, wipe the cart).
After fix, retest full flow: add on / → nav to /menu → nav to /checkout → fill form → Place Order → land on /order/:id showing KHFC-YYMMDD-NNNN and 'Received' active step.
